name: Juice Shop TN — hardened redirect allowlist (no open redirect)

provenance.note: True-negative control: redirect guarded by an exact/startsWith allowlist. Verifies the analyzer does not flag a correctly-validated redirect.

notes: Both sides validate toUrl = query.to against redirectAllowlist with exact-match (plus an anchored startsWith for query strings) before res.redirect — never a substring includes() check. No vulnerability is introduced; this is the safe counterpart to js09 and must produce zero findings.
